presets.name: Max FPS — No Shadows
presets.description: Disables shadow rendering entirely for the biggest FPS gain on low-end hardware. Works in any game.
presets.author: binx-ux

presets.name: Low Latency Input
presets.description: Reduces input lag by disabling render-ahead and smoothing. Best for competitive / PvP games.
presets.author: binx-ux

presets.name: Potato Mode
presets.description: Absolute minimum visuals. Turns off textures, shadows, LOD distance, wind, and grass. For the oldest hardware.
presets.author: binx-ux
